title: 'Abdallah b. Tahir's lengthy campaigns against Nasr b. Shabath; 'Abdallah 's letters to Nasr inviting his submission and guaranteeing his safety; Nasr's final submission and the demolition of his fort
description: 'Abdallah b. Tahir's lengthy campaigns against Nasr b. Shabath; 'Abdallah 's letters to Nasr inviting his submission and guaranteeing his safety; Nasr's final submission and the demolition of his fort. Recorded under the year 209 AH (824–825 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
